items.title: Gina Rinehart and estranged kids liable for large legal costs after royalties trial

children.content: Mining billionaire Gina Rinehart and her two estranged children will have to pay a large chunk of the legal costs able to recovered from a mammoth trial that determined the payment of royalties from some of Australia's most lucrative iron ore mines, a WA judge has ruled.

items.title: 'Immense breach of human rights': WA strip searches double in three years

children.content: The number of people strip searched by police officers in Western Australia more than doubles in three years, leading some to label the practice a human rights violation.
